source.reference: M118LR 175gr SMK (Sierra MatchKing #2275). G7 BC=0.243 Litz Doppler radar (DTIC ADA554683, Applied Ballistics §10.7). Sierra published G1: 0.505/0.496/0.485 stepped. US Army ATAC confirmed.
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.
